risk_if_not_implemented: Without Layered Network Defenses, network defenses are weakened, enabling lateral movement and exploitation of unprotected pathways.

compensating_control_1.name: Boundary Protection
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to monitor and control communications at the external network boundary and at key internal boundaries within the network.
compensating_control_1.justification: Boundary Protection (NET-03) provides network-level access restriction that compensates for the absence of Layered Network Defenses (NET-02) by limiting attacker reach and lateral movement opportunities across the environment. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Endpoint Protection Measures
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to protect the confidentiality, integrity, availability and safety of endpoint devices.
compensating_control_2.justification: Endpoint Protection Measures (END-02) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of Layered Network Defenses (NET-02) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Technology applicability. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
